title: festuca glauca subsp. pallens
intro: Festuca glauca subsp. pallens, also known as blue fescue grass, is a perennial grass species native to the mountainous regions of Europe, Asia, and North Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Festuca glauca subsp. pallens include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
